name: Intune compliance policy to device resolution

statements.__comment: Clean up previous APPLIES_TO relationships from compliance policies to devices
statements.query: MATCH (:IntuneCompliancePolicy)-[r:APPLIES_TO]->(:IntuneManagedDevice) DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Policy assigned to a group: traverse group -> user -> device
statements.query: MATCH (policy:IntuneCompliancePolicy)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(g:EntraGroup)<-[:MEMBER_OF]-(u:EntraUser)-[:ENROLLED_TO]->(device:IntuneManagedDevice) MERGE (policy)-[:APPLIES_TO]->(device) RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Policy applies to all users: match all devices with an enrolled user in the same tenant
statements.query: MATCH (policy:IntuneCompliancePolicy)<-[:RESOURCE]-(t:EntraTenant)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:IntuneManagedDevice) WHERE policy.applies_to_all_users = true MATCH (u:EntraUser)-[:ENROLLED_TO]->(device) MERGE (policy)-[:APPLIES_TO]->(device) RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Policy applies to all devices: match all managed devices in the same tenant
statements.query: MATCH (policy:IntuneCompliancePolicy)<-[:RESOURCE]-(t:EntraTenant)-[:RESOURCE]->(device:IntuneManagedDevice) WHERE policy.applies_to_all_devices = true MERGE (policy)-[:APPLIES_TO]->(device) RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted
